evaluation.text_to_sql_input: Provide the salary and award year for inducted players.
evaluation.user_intention: Find the salary and award year for inducted players.
evaluation.expected_sql: SELECT HOF.PLAYER_ID, SALARY.SALARY, AWARD.YEAR FROM THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_HALL_OF_FAME HOF JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_PLAYER_AWARD_VOTE AWARD ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = AWARD.PLAYER_ID JOIN THEHISTORYOFBASEBALL_SALARY SALARY ON HOF.PLAYER_ID = SALARY.PLAYER_ID WHERE HOF.INDUCTED = 'Y'
evaluation.generated_sql: SELECT s.salary, a.year FROM kaggle.thehistoryofbaseball_hall_of_fame h JOIN kaggle.thehistoryofbaseball_salary s ON h.player_id = s.player_id JOIN kaggle.thehistoryofbaseball_player_award a ON h.player_id = a.player_id WHERE LOWER(h.inducted) = 'y'
